name: Kartoffelsuppe (Potato Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and thinly slice potatoes, onion, and celery.
2. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add the sliced vegetables and sauté for 3 to 5 minutes until slightly tender.
3. Transfer all the vegetables to a large pot. Add just enough boiling water to cover the vegetables, then add bay leaf and salt.
4. Place the pot on the stove and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to maintain a simmer and cook the vegetables until they are tender, about 15-20 minutes.
5. Remove the bay leaf before mashing the vegetables in the pot with a potato masher or fork.
6. Add butter to the mashed vegetables and stir until well combined.
7. Thinly add milk (up to 2 cups) to achieve desired consistency. Continue stirring until warm, but do not allow the soup to boil.
8. Serve hot in bowls, garnishing each serving with chopped parsley.
